title: nigella segetalis
intro: Nigella segetalis, also known as the Roman coriander or wild fennel, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and antispasmodic effects, which can help to relieve digestive issues such as bloating and cramps. The health benefits of Nigella segetalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Nigella seeds can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
